overview: Nephron Explorer is an interactive adventure that takes you on a journey through the kidney and nephron. Click through a visual map of the nephron pathway, watch animations at each stage, and explore how the kidney filters your blood — no quizzes, just pure exploration.
features: Interactive nephron + kidney map with clickable stage nodes
Cinematic welcome screen zooming into the kidney
Step-by-step adventure navigation through 5 nephron stages
Educational animations at each stage showing what happens
Info panels with substances processed and reabsorption details
